    All Classes and Interfaces|All Packages|Serialized Form

    R

    register(RegisterRequestDto) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.service.AuthService
    Processes the register request by checking if the user already exists and if not creates one.
    RegisterRequestDto - Class in com.pitlane.pitlane.dto
    A Dto created to register the user
    RegisterRequestDto() - Constructor for class com.pitlane.pitlane.dto.RegisterRequestDto
     
    registerUser(RegisterRequestDto) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.controller.AuthController
    Routing that allows the user to register
    resolveAlert(UUID, User) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.controller.AlertController
    Marks an alert as resolved and associates the time of the request as the resolved time
    resolveAlert(UUID, User) - Method in class com.pitlane.pitlane.service.AlertService
    Checks if the user that made the request owns the alert and sets the alert resolvedAt field with the current date
